sections.content: Electoral Photo Identity Card (EPIC) issued by Election Commission of India. Required for voting. Also accepted as ID/address proof. Linked to specific polling booth and constituency. Available as physical card and e-EPIC (digital, downloadable).

Apply online at voters.eci.gov.in or NVSP app. Fill Form 6 (new registration). Need: age proof (18+ on qualifying date 1 Jan/1 Apr/1 Jul/1 Oct), address proof, passport photo. BLO (Booth Level Officer) may visit for verification. EPIC issued within 15-30 days.

Form 8: correction in entries (name/photo/address/DOB). Form 6A: overseas voter registration. Form 7: objection to inclusion. Transfer: if moved to new constituency, apply fresh Form 6 in new area + Form 7 to delete from old. All online via voters.eci.gov.in.

Download digital voter ID from voters.eci.gov.in after face-matching verification. Valid for identification. Contains QR code with encrypted details. Available on DigiLocker also. No need to carry physical card if e-EPIC on phone.
